
# The Fundamental Question

## Chapter Purpose

Introduce the central debate surrounding whether life produced consciousness or consciousness preceded life. Discuss emergence, explanatory gaps, reductionism, and systems thinking.

## Suggested Topics

- 
- 
- 

## Suggested Figures or Tables

- 
- 
- 

## Key Questions

- 
- 
- 

## Notes

Add examples, references, equations, diagrams, case studies, or comparative discussions here.
